title: Onboarding - Check onboarding screens UI
scenario: Onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) UI verification on first launch of Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time after installation.
Observe the first onboarding screen titled 'Organized'.
Swipe left or tap Next to proceed to the second onboarding screen titled 'Up-to-Date'.
Swipe left or tap Next to proceed to the third onboarding screen titled 'Personal'.
Observe all UI elements on each screen, including title text, description text, illustrations/graphics, and navigation controls (Next button, Skip button, page indicators).
expected: The onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) display correctly with proper title text, description text, illustrations, and navigation controls (Next/Skip buttons, page indicators). All text is readable, images are not distorted, and the flow proceeds smoothly from one screen to the next.
